title: Speaking - Part 2
description: Look at the photograph and say what you can see.

tasks.instructions: Here is your photograph. It shows people cleaning a beach. Please tell us what you can see in the photograph.

images.label: A
images.description: Three young people are cleaning a beach together. They are wearing gloves and putting rubbish into large bags. There is sand, the sea and some pieces of plastic on the ground.

followUp.question: Talk about the people. Talk about the place. Talk about other things in the photograph.

tasks.instructions: Here is your photograph. It shows people playing badminton. Please tell us what you can see in the photograph.

images.label: B
images.description: Two girls are playing badminton in a garden. One girl is reaching up to hit the shuttlecock and the other is standing on the opposite side of a small net. There are trees and garden chairs behind them.

followUp.question: Talk about the people. Talk about the place. Talk about other things in the photograph.
